title: Dekton 8oz Fibreglass Claw Hammer-Anti-Slip Handle| Shock-Absorbing Fibreglass Core| Durable Steel Head| Precision Balanced| Heavy-Duty Nail Removal| Ideal for Construction, Carpentry| High Resistant
features: Precision Balanced for Optimal Performance: The Dekton 8oz Fibreglass Claw Hammer is engineered with a precision-balanced design that ensures every strike is powerful and accurate. Whether you're driving nails into wood or pulling them out, this hammer provides the perfect balance between weight and force.

Shock-Absorbing Fibreglass Core: Featuring a fibreglass core that absorbs shock and reduces vibration, this claw hammer significantly decreases the strain on your hands and arms during extended use. The shock-absorbing properties make it ideal for both professional and DIY applications, offering enhanced comfort and control even during heavy-duty tasks.

Durable Steel Head for Long-Lasting Use: Crafted with a high-quality, heat-treated steel head, the Dekton Claw Hammer is built to withstand rigorous use. Its robust construction ensures that the hammer remains durable and effective, strike after strike, making it a reliable tool for construction, carpentry, and other demanding projects.

Heavy-Duty Nail Removal with Ease: The claw of the hammer is designed for efficient and heavy-duty nail removal. Its curved design provides maximum leverage, allowing you to extract nails with minimal effort. Whether you're dealing with stubborn nails or working on delicate surfaces, this hammer's claw ensures precise and damage-free nail removal every time.

Anti-Slip Handle for Secure Grip: Equipped with an anti-slip handle, this hammer offers a secure and comfortable grip, even in wet or oily conditions. The ergonomic design fits naturally in your hand, reducing the risk of slipping and ensuring that you maintain full control over your work, enhancing safety and efficiency on the job.
description: The Dekton 8oz Fibreglass Claw Hammer is an essential tool for any toolbox, delivering exceptional performance and reliability for both professional and DIY projects. Crafted with a shock-absorbing fibreglass core, this hammer minimizes vibrations, reducing strain on your hands and arms, making it ideal for extended use in construction, carpentry, and home improvement tasks. The anti-slip handle provides a secure grip, ensuring precise control even in challenging conditions, whether you're working indoors or outdoors. This hammer's ergonomic design ensures comfort, allowing you to work efficiently without discomfort. Built with a durable steel head, the Dekton Claw Hammer is engineered to withstand rigorous use, making it perfect for heavy-duty tasks. The precision-balanced design offers superior control and accuracy, ensuring each strike is powerful and effective. The heavy-duty nail removal claw is specifically designed to provide maximum leverage, making it easier to extract even the most stubborn nails with minimal effort. Ideal for a wide range of applications, from framing and roofing to general repairs and woodworking, the Dekton Claw Hammer is versatile enough to meet all your needs. Its high-resistance materials ensure longevity, so you can rely on it for years of use. Whether you're a professional tradesperson or a DIY enthusiast, this hammer combines strength, durability, and comfort to help you get the job done right. The Dekton Claw Hammer is not just a tool; it's a dependable companion for any task that requires precision, power, and reliability.
